title: potentilla clusiana
intro: Potentilla clusiana, also known as the Currant or Red Robin, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Potentilla clusiana include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Potentilla clusiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
